---
title: "Data, State, and Representation"
---

# Data, State, and Representation

Range: `0250-0371`.

## Completion

| Status   | Count |
| -------- | ----- |
| authored | 122   |

Use the summary table for scanning. Each row links to the detailed anchored entry below.

| Sigil | Term                                | Completion | Summary                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ----- | ----------------------------------- | ---------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 0250  | [address](#rune-0250)               | authored   | `address` is a data and state rune for control shape, identity, lifecycle, and representation drift; use it when the artifact needs the address obligation named before work proceeds.                                 |
| 0251  | [aggregate state](#rune-0251)       | authored   | `aggregate state` is a data and state rune for control shape, identity, lifecycle, and representation drift; use it when the artifact needs the aggregate state obligation named before work proceeds.                 |

## Entries

### [0250] address {#rune-0250}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `address` is a data and state rune for control shape, identity, lifecycle, and representation drift; use it when the artifact needs the address obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `address` at rune 0250 in the data lane can let stored shape can diverge from the world it claims to model; verify by requiring the caster to state invariants, null behavior, and compatibility expectations.

### [0251] aggregate state {#rune-0251}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `aggregate state` is a data and state rune for control shape, identity, lifecycle, and representation drift; use it when the artifact needs the aggregate state obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `aggregate state` at rune 0251 in the data lane can let stored shape can diverge from the world it claims to model; verify by requiring the caster to state invariants, null behavior, and compatibility expectations.

### [0252] array {#rune-0252}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A contiguous ordered collection accessed by position.

**Shadow:** misusing `array` at rune 0252 in the data lane can let stored shape can diverge from the world it claims to model; verify by requiring the caster to state invariants, null behavior, and compatibility expectations.

**Pocket gloss:** A contiguous ordered collection accessed by position.

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** `bag` is a data and state rune for control shape, identity, lifecycle, and representation drift; use it when the artifact needs the bag obligation named before work proceeds.

**Shadow:** misusing `bag` at rune 0253 in the data lane can let stored shape can diverge from the world it claims to model; verify by requiring the caster to state invariants, null behavior, and compatibility expectations.

**Status:** canonical
